content:
# Meta-Rule: Multi-Agent Coordination v4

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.80
AND tile_novelty > 0.73
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 2 automated workers
2. Explore high-uncertainty regions
3. Generate 13 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 16.7% improvement in insight quality
